description:
This ad is for weekly rentals beginning on a weekend. The best nightly rate is if you book for 7 nights. Williamsburg is ideal for a family vacation as there is so much to do in the area.

The space
I am an owner of several weeks at Plantation. Therefore, I can offer you reduced prices. The ad is for 4 bedrooms. If you need only 2 BRs, please ask and you will only pay about half the asking price. Other than the airbnb fee, the only other mandatory fee is a $30 resort fee per week for In Unit WIFI, printing and fax, fitness center, DVD and books rentals.

The units are equipped with a romantic Jacuzzi tub, a cozy fireplace, and a private patio or balcony. All homes at this resort are professionally decorated and nicely equipped with everything you’ll need including all kitchenware, towels, linens, pillows, blankets, etc.

The upstairs and downstairs units will EACH have the following:
Master bedroom can have a king bed or 2 twin beds. The 2nd bedroom has a queen bed. There is a pullout sofa bed in the living room.

Guest access
There is a club house and guests can use the indoor and outdoor pools and gym for free. There are tennis courts with basketball hoops too.

Other things to note
Minimum age is 21 to check in. A credit card is needed for a security deposit.

description:
Turn back the pages of time and become immersed in the Colonial spirit of Williamsburg, a historic city steeped in tradition and forever preserved as part of our nation's history.

The space
Turn back the pages of time and become immersed in the Colonial spirit of Williamsburg, a historic city steeped in tradition and forever preserved as part of our nation's history. Discover this 170-acre Early American town featuring 18th-century English architecture restored to its original condition, historic museums, monuments and fascinating battlefields which tell the dramatic story of our country's birth.Peacefully situated amid 256 acres of rolling woodland hills, and boasting all the character of a distinguished manor house, The Historic Powhatan Resort captures the essence of its Colonial surroundings. Originally built circa 1735, this restored manor house offers a serene getaway during any season.With activities to entertain the entire family, The Historic Powhatan Resort offers indoor and outdoor swimming pools, tennis, an outdoor pavilion and a playground. Dine in The Powhatan Bar and Grille, or enjoy our new coffee house, The Historic Grounds.

2 bedroom condo has a king bed, queen bed or two twin beds, queen sleeper sofa, living room, full kitchen, 2 full bathrooms, and washer/dryer!

This is a timeshare resort but attending a presentation or taking a tour is NOT required.

All units are assigned by the resort. Unit view, floor, and location of unit on property cannot be guaranteed.

Guest checking in must be at least 21 years of age with a valid ID and credit card for security deposit.

Pricing and availability may vary.

Once reservations are confirmed, you will be asked for the name and address of the main guest who will check in (the resort's front desk will also ask for this information when you check in but obtaining this information before hand will expedite the check in process) along with an email address to receive a personal confirmation.

Guest access
Guest will have access to all amenities at the resort.

Challenge yourself at Ford's Colony, featuring 54 holes at one of the highest-ranked golf courses in Virginia.



Dining


Enjoy the convenience of The Marketplace store and deli, plus the acclaimed Dining Room at Ford's Colony, one of the most distinguished restaurants in North America.



Exercise & recreation


It's easy to stay active with a 24-hour fitness center with a sauna, lighted tennis courts, shuffleboard, game room, bike rentals, and jogging and biking trails.



Pools

Experience an unforgettable blend of historic charm and modern thrills.

Williamsburg's wide selection of malls, boutiques, restaurants, spas, golf courses and historical sites and attractions offer a variety of ways to enjoy your vacation at your own pace.




Botanical gardens

Visit more than 30 beautiful and exotic-themed gardens at the nationally recognized Norfolk Botanical Garden.





Historical sights

Experience pre-Revolutionary War America at Jamestown Settlement, where costumed historical interpreters describe and demonstrate daily life in the early 17th century. At Yorktown, visit colonial dwellings that stood during the siege of 1781, when Washington won the Battle of Yorktown to secure our nation's independence.





Science & space centers

Visit the maritime-themed science center, Nauticus, to experience hands-on exhibits, interactive theaters, aquariums, digital high-definition films and more. Discover the Virginia Air & Space Center's historic aircraft, including the Apollo 12 command module that went to the moon.





Shopping

Shop for brand-name values at the Prime Outlets at Williamsburg, or peruse more than 70,000 items at the 200-acre Williamsburg Pottery.


Theme parks

Spend a fun-filled day at area theme parks, including the world-class Busch Gardens Williamsburg and the thrilling water rides and attractions of Water Country USA.


Wine tasting

Enjoy a wine-tasting tour any time of year at The Williamsburg Winery and receive a monogrammed glass as a souvenir.

description:
The Casita is a cozy 2 bedroom, one bath, small dog friendly home is on a corner lot in a family friendly neighborhood just minutes from major attractions like Busch Gardens-Water Country. The area is rich with historical sites. Be sure to visit Colonial Williamsburg, Jamestown and Yorktown. There is a shopping center with a Grocery store and restaurants within walking distance from the property.

The space
The Casita is fully stocked with everything you would need for your vacation. Condiments, paper towels, toilet paper, linens, towels and wash cloths. There is a variety of paintings, travel decor and metal sculptures outdoors.

PET RULES: Small Dogs (Toy Breeds) are Welcome at the Casita!
Exceptions may be made for one larger dog, considered on a case-by-case basis. (Please note: extra-hairy breeds such as German Shepherds, Huskies, etc., are not accepted.)

All pets must be well-behaved. Pets are not allowed on uncovered couches or beds. If your pet lounges with you, please bring couch covers. If your furry friend sleeps with you, please bring your own linens.

If you leave your pet at home, please kennel them or take them with you.

Lastly—and most importantly—please pick up after your pet.

When you request to stay, please include a message confirming that you agree to these rules, and I will be happy to host you. Thank you!

Extended Stays-Beyond 30 days. Please provide a detailed message about your plans. A full detailed message will make me feel comfortable hosting for an extended stay.

Guest access
Guests will have access to the entire home except the garage and sheds. Please use the home as if it is your own and help me keep it ready for the next guests that will be checking in.

Other things to note
The home is centrally located to the major attractions like Busch gardens, Water Country, Jamestown, Yorktown, Colonial Williamsburg. If you're interested in outdoor activities such as running, hiking, bicycling canoeing, kayaking etc. There is a few parks in the area that cater to the outdoorsy type. New Quarter Park is just down the street. Free parking and activities include a 7 mile mountain bike trail, 2 mile hiking trail, a canoe or kayak launch(bring your own) and a full disc golf course. Freedom Park is about 20 mins from the house and the park has about 5 miles of hiking trails and 25 miles of mountain bike trails. Go Ape is also at freedom park which hosts a zipline tour through the woods. York River State Park is 20min away. Parking is $4 and offers canoe and kayak hourly rentals, horse trails for the equine lovers, 20 miles of mountain bike trails and 5 miles of hiking trails. If you would like to visit the Capital of Virginia, Richmond is about 45min-1hr away. Take the beautiful scenic route 5 and be sure to visit the plantations along the way. There's always something going on in the city of Richmond. If you want to see the Atlantic Ocean, The Virginia Beach oceanfront is 1:30 hrs away. Whatever your into or would like to know more about the area, just ask and I would be glad to suggest ideas for just about anything. I hope you choose to stay at the Casita and enjoy what Williamsburg has to offer.

description:
My place is close to Marriott's Manor Club at Ford's Colony is nestled within an exclusive, gated 3,000-acre planned community boasting the Williamsburg region's most acclaimed golf and dining.

Surrounding your resort are some of the most iconic spots in our nation's glorious past, including Yorktown and the amazing Jamestown Settlement replica. family-friendly activities. My place is good for couples and families (with kids).

The space
Important Alerts
Guests should be aware of the following:

Construction Updates
The adjacent property, Ford’s Colony Eaglescliff, is undergoing renovation. Please anticipate visible and audible construction work during normal business hours. Work is expected to continue through 2024​​​​​​.

Cashless Resort
There is no cash available at this resort, and credit cards are the only acceptable form of payment.

Service Animal Policy
Service animals that perform work or tasks are welcome at this resort, but family pets are not permitted. Bringing a pet to the resort will result in a room recovery fee. In the event we discover that you have brought a pet to the resort, you will be charged a room recovery fee in the amount of $500 per pet and you will be asked to take your pet to a local, third-party boarding facility.

Please be aware that in some locations, misrepresenting a pet as a service animal is a misdemeanor and may result in a monetary penalty and/or imprisonment.



Marriott is now requiring for us to add your address, email and phone number once you’ve booked to avoid problems at check-in.

Your spacious vacation retreat.

After a day of fun in Williamsburg, return to your comfortably spacious villa at Marriott's Manor Club at Ford's Colony. Our well-appointed villas have ample living and dining space for the whole family or a group of friends. Enjoy your vacation home away from home.

Guest access
A vacation home that feels like home.

Throughout Marriott's Manor Club at Ford's Colony, you'll find location amenities that cater to active vacations, including swimming pools, tennis courts, barbecue grills, shuffleboard, jogging and biking trails, a game room, a sauna and more. Plus, the resort is nestled within Ford's Colony Williamsburg, an exclusive gated 3,000-acre planned community boasting the region's most acclaimed golf and dining.
Championship golf

Championship golf: Challenge yourself at Ford's Colony, featuring 54 holes at one of the highest-ranked golf courses in Virginia.
Dining

Dining: Enjoy the convenience of The Marketplace* store and deli, plus the acclaimed Dining Room at Ford’s Colony, one of the most distinguished restaurants in North America.
Exercise & recreation

Exercise & recreation: It’s easy to stay active with a 24-hour fitness center with a sauna*, lighted tennis courts*, shuffleboard*, game room*, bike rentals*, and jogging and biking trails*.
Pools

Pools: Relax, refresh and rejuvenate at the indoor pool*, two outdoor heated pools and three whirlpool spas*.
Theater

Theater: Enjoy movie nights with the whole family at our Showtime Movie Theater.

Cashless Resort
There is no cash available at this resort, and credit cards are the only acceptable form of payment.

Amenity Status
The current status of resort amenities and services is subject to change at any time. Please continue to check this website frequently for updates prior to your upcoming reservation.

Other things to note
Experience an unforgettable blend of historic charm and modern thrills.

Williamsburg's wide selection of malls, boutiques, restaurants, spas, golf courses and historical sites and attractions offer a variety of ways to enjoy your vacation at your own pace.

Botanical gardens
Visit more than 30 beautiful and exotic-themed gardens at the nationally recognized Norfolk Botanical Garden.

Historical sights
Experience pre-Revolutionary War America at Jamestown Settlement, where costumed historical interpreters describe and demonstrate daily life in the early 17th century. At Yorktown, visit colonial dwellings that stood during the siege of 1781, when Washington won the Battle of Yorktown to secure our nation’s independence.

Science & space centers
Visit the maritime-themed science center, Nauticus, to experience hands-on exhibits, interactive theaters, aquariums, digital high-definition films and more. Discover the Virginia Air & Space Center's historic aircraft, including the Apollo 12 command module that went to the moon.

Shopping
Shop for brand-name values at the Prime Outlets at Williamsburg, or peruse more than 70,000 items at the 200-acre Williamsburg Pottery.

Theme parks
Spend a fun-filled day at area theme parks, including the world-class Busch Gardens Williamsburg and the thrilling water rides and attractions of Water Country USA.

Wine tasting
Enjoy a wine-tasting tour any time of year at The Williamsburg Winery and receive a monogrammed glass as a souvenir.

description:
Private entrance, nice deck, plenty of parking and close to everything. We’re excited to host you!

The space
A stay at The Burgs Nest will assure you a safe and naturally beautiful space both inside and outside. Everything in The Burgs Nest is fresh and fun. You’ll enjoy a very private upstairs entrance and deck in this second story dwelling. There is plenty of parking included for you. The kitchen has a full size fridge, toaster, microwave and stove. Pots, pans, dishes and glasses are provided. We have ‘staple’ foods such as catsup, mustard, cooking oil, coffee and tea, in the kitchen for your enjoyment. You’ll find plenty of open drawer space, over door hooks for hanging things up, a wardrobe and chairs and dressers for your clothing and luggage. There is also extra space for your shopping finds and your ‘stuff.’ Guests rave about how comfy our pillows and beds are, too!

Guest access
Guests have a separate private entrance to the space. Access is with a key. Our location and detailed instructions on entry are provided prior to your arrival.

Other things to note
We’re only one mile from Williamsburg Winery! We’re about 3 miles to Colonial Williamsburg, The College of William & Mary, Jamestown and Busch Gardens.

Williamsburg has plenty of microbreweries and they all have a fun vibe, some offering different entertainment and events weekly. We also have a meadery, a distillery and several wineries in the area. For those with a preference of spirits of the nonalcoholic variety, we have some pretty cool ghost tours, too!

description:
WILLIAMSBURG AREA, SURRY, VA. CELEBRATE AMERICA'S 250TH by living in the historic family home of a Revolutionary War soldier! Lightwood Forest is a beautiful historic house nestled in 110 acres of private woodland preserve. Surround yourself with history, antiques, art and nature, and over two miles of private hiking trails.
Lightwood Forest is in rural Surry County, on the south side of the James River, a short, free car ferry ride from Williamsburg and Jamestown, which runs 24/7, all year.

The space
Celebrate America's 250th by staying in the family home of a Revolutionary War soldier who served under Washington!, standing on land once owned by Pocahontas and John Rolfe! Before going off to war, Aaron and Cathryn Wall named their son Patrick Henry Wall. There was no question about their loyalties.

Lightwood House sits in a private 110-acre park of magnificent ancient woods, fields, and streams, which was part of the wedding gift of Chief Powhatan to his daughter, Pocahontas, and her English husband, John Rolfe. Settled by the English in the early 17th century, the property can be explored via our two miles of hiking trails, where those with keen eyes can discern traces of long-vanished settlement, and ancient trees.

description:
A spacious & unpretentious atmosphere serving a full hot breakfast & located just outside the historic area. Tom,a licensed tour guide of CW,Jamestown & Yorktown, loves history & manages the B&B while Sue works at The Cheese Shop. Enjoy our hospitality & home as a myriad of guests have done with delight through our 20yrs of sharing our home. CW(2 blocks),William & Mary(1.25 miles),Restaurants(.25 mile),Busch Gardens(3 miles), shopping & golfing nearby.B&B is available for weekly rental(call us).

The space
We offer 3 rooms. This listing: The Anderson Room (2nd floor, very spacious with 2 king beds & private full bath. $165/night/double occupancy-4 max-each add. person add $25-reserve through AirBnB or website).
The Patton Room (2nd floor, large room with a king bed & private full bath $165/night-2 max-reserve through AirBnB or website).
The Lewis Room (2nd floor, regular size bedroom & private full bath with a queen bed $145/night-2 max-reserve through AirBnB or website)
(11% Tax and Occupancy tax are included in pricing).
Our full hot breakfast is served family style & is the best time to visit with us and get all the local information & guidance for your visit. Guests love talking history & CW with Tom. aldrichhouse will show all B&B policies. B&B is also available for weekly rental (call us).

Guest access
Our spacious living room & dining room are common areas. Our home is spacious with wide hallways & a gradual sloping staircase. Those who enjoy smoking are welcome to smoke on the back porch. Our kitchen is offered with limits and if you stay with us for a week, we allow you to use our laundry room when available. Curbside parking is available.

Other things to note
We are a 5 minute walk to Colonial Williamsburg and can begin walking through town immediately. Once you have your tickets for admission you can begin exploring the buildings & using their bus transportation. William & Mary is a 30 minute walk (1.25 miles from the B&B). Runners love an early morning run from the house through CW to the College before breakfast.

A mid-week cleaning includes beds being made with fresh linens, removal of trash and replacement of liners, exchange of all bath and kitchen linens, and the vacuuming of the unit. Unit towel or linen exchange may also be arranged for a fee. A $75 fine is applicable for units left excessively unclean.

Designated units meet Americans with Disabilities Act (ADA) requirements.

CW is just around the corner, Jamestown is 8 miles west, Yorktown is 12 miles east, Busch Gardens & Water Country USA are 3 miles away, golf courses and shopping areas are everywhere.

description:
The Colonies at Williamsburg Resort consists of 288 two-bedroom (or 144 four-bedroom) condominiums spread across 27 low-rise buildings. Buildings vary between two and three floors with no elevators. This ad is for weekly rentals beginning on a weekend. Williamsburg is ideal for a family vacation as there is so much to do in the area. You must pay for 7 nights. If you prefer a 2BR unit for up to 6 people, the price will be lower. Please ask me to confirm pricing and availability before reserving.

The space
The Colonies at Williamsburg Resort accommodations feature two-and four-bedroom floor plans designed for maximum comfort. Kitchen, living room and dining room areas in each suite are integrated for entertaining and enjoyment.

Unit Features
Individual living and dining rooms in all suites
Ceramic tile and carpeted floors in living areas
Fully appointed kitchens equipped with granite countertops, stainless steel appliances such as range, dishwasher, full-size refrigerator with ice maker, microwave oven, coffee maker, toaster and blender
Necessary cookware and dinnerware service included in each suite
Conveniently located washers and dryers (in the unit or the building)
Jetted tubs
Over-sized tiled showers in master bath
Makeup table with magnified mirror/ vanity area
Writing desk
In-room fireplaces
Four-bedroom suites feature two king beds, two queen beds, and two queen sleeper sofas
Rollaway beds, cribs and highchairs available upon request for extra fee
All linens and bath towels and swimming towels provided
Televisions in living room and bedrooms
DVD Players
Cable television with HBO
In-room WiFi
In-room safe
Furnished balconies or patios
Hair dryers
Ironing board with iron

Guest access
Resort Amenities
1 heated indoor pool
1 outdoor pool featuring numerous water features (9AM-10PM)
1 large outdoor hot tub
Lounge chairs and pool towels
Barbecue grills and picnic tables
Children’s playground
Tennis
Arcade/game room
Family center with large screen TV, Wii gaming console and ping pong table
Fitness center (7AM-11PM)
Computer center
Vending and ice machines, complementary coffee/tea in the lobby and room

Resort Services:
Free parking
Security on site
Concierge service
Complimentary DVD movie checkout
Complimentary coffee/tea in the Clubhouse
Daily scheduled activities
Housekeeping services are not included. Mid-week cleaning is available upon request at a charge.

Other things to note
Check-in: 4:00 pm local time Check-out: 10:00 am local time (Some flexibility is possible depending on the resort)
Minimum age for check-in is 21. Picture ID, major credit card.
The Colonies at Williamsburg Resort is open 24 hours, 7 days a week. Please call the resort to notify of late arrivals.
Rollaway beds, cribs and highchairs are available on a first-come, first-served basis.
Guest must request items at check-in and they may not be reserved in advance. Charges apply.
Housekeeping services are not included. Guests are asked to dispose of trash in several conveniently located sites on property. Mid-week cleaning is available upon request at a charge of $25 for the 2BR. A mid-week cleaning includes beds being made with fresh linens, removal of trash and replacement of liners, exchange of all bath and kitchen linens, and the vacuuming of the unit. Unit towel or linen exchange may also be arranged for a fee. A $75 fine is applicable for units left excessively unclean.
Parking of recreational vehicles/equipment is not allowed on the property. Contact the resort directly for recommendations on available approved parking.
Select rooms are pet friendly for a non-refundable $125 pet fee. Approval must be obtained prior to arrival. Once approved, an up-to-date vaccination record from a veterinarian will be required at check-in.
There is a $30 resort fee due at check-in.

description:
A cute 2-bedroom/1-bath house. Convenient to: Historic Triangle (Colonial Williamsburg /Jamestown / Yorktown), Busch Gardens, Williamsburg Outlet Mall, The College of W&M. Within walking distance of the Newtown pedestrian mall, Colonial Williamsburg Trolley bus line, and multi-use trail. Only available during the summer (rented to college students during the academic year). Fully fenced (6-feet high) backyard.

The space
House has central air system (new, spring of 2017). House has DVDs, games, toys, arts & crafts supplies for all ages, pet supplies, an outdoor grill and firepit and outdoor activities (bean bag toss, croquet). Backyard is fully fenced (6-feet high).

Guest access
Guests have access to the entire house. Entry is keyless. Access code provided prior to check-in. Both bedrooms are located upstairs and the stairs are short and unusually steep. The only bathroom is downstairs. The downstairs living room has a couch, TV, and a double bed. The living room has comfortable seating for only three adults - the couch and a chair.

Other things to note
The stairs are unusually steep and short. Both bedrooms are upstairs. The only bathroom is downstairs. The dining room, living room, and kitchen are downstairs. There is a double bed in the living room should guests find the stairs challenging. The living room has traditional seating for only 3 adults: a couch and a chair.

listing_name: Colonial Cottage II old Williamsburg charm
description:
Parties are not allowed.
This is a charming historic cottage that backs up to the Colonial Pkwy. Across the road is an equestrian farm that offers a magnificent sunset view from the brick patio. The back of the property is surrounded by a fairytale wooded landscape. Minutes from Jamestown Island.. Colonial Williamsburg and much more including Busch Gardens and water country. Convenient location near William and Mary

The space
One flight of stairs gets you to the second upstairs bedroom and bath area. I want to assure guests that we will deploy all methods of sanitizing at our disposal. I have operated my childcare center for over 25 years and studied microbiology. We will do our best to address these concerns for our guests. I also would ask if when you first enter the cottage if we can make a habit of washing our hands for the 20 second period suggested. If any guests has symptoms before, during or after arrival to please notify your host immediately. There are two local hospitals. Sentara and Riversided. I will keep all guests updated to any and all information in regards to the virus. I would like to think that traveling by car and staying in a more individualized space as is an ABNB would reduce the risk. We will do our best.

Guest access
Kitchen, huge yard, family room, and full access to house.

Other things to note
Please be mindful of beautiful finished floors and wool rug. It is appreciated that shoes be taken off at the entry way during bad weather days.

description:
Minimum of 1 night stay (for weekdays only) No one night reservation for the weekend (Friday and Saturday) will be accepted.

This beautiful one bedroom, one bathroom condo is 870 sq. ft. and is located at Kingsmill Resort. Your condo offers a king size bed as well as a sleeper sofa in the living room. Awesome private porch with golf and water view!

The space
This beautiful one bedroom, one bathroom condo is 870 sq. ft. and is located at Kingsmill Resort. Located on the first floor, your condo offers a king size bed as well as a sleeper sofa in the living room. The bathroom features a shower/bath tub supplied with fresh linens.
Enjoy a homemade meal courtesy of the kitchen - equipped with dishes, silverware, cooking utensils, wine/water glasses, Keurig coffee machine, refrigerator, microwave, oven, smooth stove top, dishwasher, and disposal – around the dining room table. Take a nice relaxing walk around KingsMill’s famous golf courses or cozy up on your private patio overlooking Warham’s Pond/the golf course and enjoy the beautiful view.

Guest access
You will have full access to the condo, the 4 mile walking trail around Kingsmill's beautiful golf courses and neighborhoods and walk down to watch sunsets at the Marina beach! The condo doesn't come with access to the resort amenities. There is no internet in the condo.

Other things to note
Due to Airbnb's system, tax is not included. Please bring 12% tax of the total amount of your stay in either personal check or money order when you check in.

Less than 5 Miles to Busch Gardens/Water Country, the Historic Colonial Williamsburg, Great Family Owned Restaurants, and Beaches located along the Colonial Parkway and in Yorktown. Don't forget to check out the prime outlets for shopping!

description:
Busch Gardens water country is only15mins away. Williamsburg Premium Outlets - 0.8 mi Ripley’s Believe It or Not 1.7 mi Williamsburg Botanical Garden 2.4 mi, Waller Mill Park 2.5 mi, Freedom Park 2.8 mi Colonial Heritage Golf Club 3 mi. Go Karts Plus 3 mi. College of William and Mary 3.1 mi.

The space
Located in Williamsburg, Virginia, which is known for its history. The resort offers a spacious condominium accommodation for your entire family with accommodation for 6. Amenities include a fitness room, activities room, indoor pool, tennis courts, and a seasonal outdoor pool with water park features and separate whirlpool. In the area are Colonial Williamsburg, Jamestown Settlement, Yorktown Battlefield and Victory Center, Busch Gardens, and Water Country USA. Also nearby are more than 100 outlet stores and numerous championship golf courses. Make yourself at home! Unit features a fireplace, flat-screen televisions and a private patio. Kitchen is outfitted with a full-sized refrigerator/freezer, stove and microwave. Dishware, cookware and silverware. Wired and wireless Internet access is complimentary, while a DVD player and cable programming provide entertainment.

Rec, Spa, Premium Amenities
Take advantage of recreational opportunities offered, including outdoor tennis courts, an indoor pool, and a spa tub. This condominium resort also features wireless Internet access, supervised childcare/activities, and an arcade/game room.

Guest access
Guests can access all parts of the private unit which has two full bedrooms and bathrooms suites in addition to a full kitchen, living room and balcony.

Other things to note
This property is Pet friendly however you MUST let me in in advance if your desire is to bring a pet as there is a pet fee and proof of vaccination associated and can only be paid at check in.

Property itself charges a $33 per week fee for use of WiFi and amenities as well as a $150 fully refundable upon check out security deposit as long as no damages are reported.

listing_name: Book a Piece of History at Kingsmill Williamsburg
description:
Focused on providing an affordable vacation spot for those looking to make wonderful memories!


BRAND NEW FLOORS!

This beautiful 2-bedroom get away offers a resort vacation on a budget! At Kingsmill you are just minutes from Busch Gardens, Colonial Williamsburg, Jamestown, and much more! Enjoy a long weekend at Kingsmill and experience a historical area in comfort.

Beautiful walking trails!

Small Water front sanded beach area of James River within a 10 minute walk.

The space
It’s all about location! This vacation property has a lot to offer in this beautifully maintained two bedroom unit! Spacious feel to Great Room w/ balcony overlooking tennis courts. Bright Master Bedroom offers walk-in closet. The enormous Second Bedroom offers two (2) full beds and full bath. The room offers its own private balcony.

Enjoy the many beautiful walking trails with scenes of the James River and the views of the famous LPGA golf courses. A two minute walk to a fun playground for the kids! Only a 10 minute drive to Busch Gardens theme park! (Check to see park hours of operation).

Their are tons of great dining and shopping options in the Williamsburg area and spend time learning about US history by exploring Colonial Williamsburg, Jamestown, and Yorktown!


Here are some fun activities to do in Kingsmill. Guests have been;

taking a picnic down to the James River Kingsmill Marina with views of the James River. (< 5 minute walk)

Small beach area (with sand) on the James River where members and guests relax, sunbath, and take a light dip in the James River.


There is a fairly large outdoor playground for the kids (< 2 minute walk from property)

Community Tennis Courts Access within the Kingsmill Community. (< 5 minute drive. NOTE: Please bring your own rackets and tennis balls. Ask for more information)


Tons of miles of beautiful walking and biking trails, and if you bring your bike or roller blades they are a great ride! (Note: Rentals in Williamsburg including “Bike the Burg” are available)

These are some recommendations for off property activities;

Busch Gardens Theme Park (< 10 minute drive, check park hours m)

Colonial Williamsburg historical sights, museums, and shops! ( < 15 minute drive)

Jamestown Beach (15 minute drive)

Jamestown historical sites and museums (15 minute drive)

Golden Horseshoe Green and Gold 18 Hole Golf Courses (15 minute drive)

Tons of dining options from fine dining, all day breakfast, fast food, and grocery stores)

Other things to note
WiFi and Cable included. (provided by Cox)

(Bike the Burg)- Bike rentals are available in Williamsburg. “Bike the Burg” has a full line of bikes for men, women, kids and trailers for toddlers. Call (757) 570-7326

Movie theaters and great shopping in Williamsburg. (Regal Cinemas located in Williamsburg)

A huge outlet mall “Williamsburg Premium Outlets) is also within a 20 minute drive from the property. Stores include Nike, Polo Ralph Lauren, Coach, Under Armour, and much more!


Property is available for long term rentals in the off-season (September - May)

This listing is for a 4BR lockoff pair of 2BR condos each sleeps 6 with full access to all resort amenities. You get 2 separate 2BR condos next to each other but pay only one resort fee.

The space
The 4BR Lockoff is actually a pair (x2) of 2BR Units with a shared common entry hallway or Upstairs/Downstairs combo of condos. 1Q or 2T bed guest room assignments depend on which building you are assigned at checkin

No one owns any one particular villa at this resort. People own points in their Club and they assign an actual unit at check in when you arrive. Bring your confirmation letter from the resort (on your phone is fine) to assist at check in and have a great time = : )

Check in begins at 4 pm but if you arrive in town prior to that by all means, visit the front desk and say hi. If your villa is ready they will be happy to check you in early and give you the keys. If not, you can explore the area while they finish cleaning and preparing for your arrival. = : )

Check out is always 10 am. The front desk will usually allow a late checkout until noon before they start adding new charges and an additional nite. It is entirely up to them and how badly they need to get into your unit to clean up before the next incoming guest. Ask about your options for late check out when you arrive. = ; )

Whether you choose a guided or self-guided tour, a carriage or a Segway, you'll discover a precious past.

listing_name: Newly Renovated! Charming 2 Bedroom near Outlets
description:
Enjoy comfort and style in this renovated home, ideal for monthly stays or those relocating to Williamsburg until they find a forever home. With new LVP flooring, modern decor, granite kitchen countertops, and a stainless steel microwave, this 2-bedroom, 1.5-bath home is both inviting and convenient.

Located across from Premium Outlets and just 10 minutes from Colonial Williamsburg, it offers a peaceful neighborhood setting with a sunroom, dedicated workspace, and a relaxing patio.

The space
Our condo comfortably sleeps up to 6 guests. It features a king-size bed in the master bedroom with a walk-in closet, a queen-size bed in the guest room, and a daybed in the sunroom. We also provide an elevated queen-size air mattress for extra flexibility.

The kitchen is fully equipped with a full-size fridge, microwave, gas stove, dishwasher, and all the necessary cookware. The sunroom offers a writing desk for any work or relaxation.

Amenities include:

Washer & Dryer
Wifi
Smart TV

The decor showcases unique items from my travels to Israel, Japan, Russia, New Zealand, Korea, and Greece, adding a special touch to your stay.

Guest access
The guess have access to the entire home.

Other things to note
The property is pet-friendly but all pets must be approved before booking. There is an additional non-refundable fee per pet of $125. There is a 2 pet limit and the pet fee is per pet. There are breed and size restrictions on pets. Please send a message with your pet details to avoid cancellations on instant booking reservations. All unauthorized pets will be charged a $300 per pet penalty.

If your stay is 60 days or more there is an additional mid-cleaning fee to ensure the upkeep of the property.

description:
This is a hotel/timeshare resort. I book rooms with my family's timeshare points to rent to help cover our maintenance fees. You check in under your own name with a guest pass I set up for you.

You must BE 21 with PHOTO ID & CREDIT CARD. At check in a hold will be placed on the card for a $10 nightly resort fee & any DAMAGES or PURCHASES.

There is NO DAILY HOUSEKEEPING.

NO PETS. NO SMOKING. NO PARTIES. May be evicted or charge for failure to do so.

CHECK IN IS 4 PM. CHECKOUT IS 10 AM.

The space
There is no specific room or view. Rooms are assigned at check in by the front desk. You can request a room change without my permission.

There is a full kitchen with utensils, dishware and cleaning supplies. Please bring your own cooking supplies such as salt, pepper and coffee.

Free Wi-FI. Parking is free.

Other dates may be available that do not show on my calendar.

Guest access
You have access to all common areas such as the pools, gym, tennis courts, playground and activity center

Other things to note
There is an indoor pool, 2 outdoor pools, an outdoor hot tub, fitness center, 2 tennis courts, miniature golf, playground, game room and organized activites.

I have a strict cancellation policy. However, if you cancel before 15 days out, I can provide a full refund except for the Airbnb fee. The resort for an extra $149 has cancellation insurance that provides full refund coverage up to 24 hours before check in except for the Airbnb fee.

Address is 619 Georgetown Crescent in Williamsburg.

The resort does not communicate with Airbnb. I am the contact between you, the resort and Airbnb. However, the resort can evict you without informing me for failure to comply with the resort rules. If they do, there are NO REFUNDS.

description:
This is a spacious apartment located above a Landscape Co. Office. It is suitable for large family vacations with 3 bedrooms and 2 baths. This two-story apartment is centrally located just 2 miles from I-64, Busch Gardens, Water Country, and Colonial Williamsburg. There are 3 smart TVs and every room has USB. The space
The apartment is a second-floor apartment with a nice exterior enclosed stairwell. The master bedroom is on the main floor. The 3rd floor has two bedrooms, a full bath (shower), and a sitting area.

The home has 3 televisions. All are high-speed WIFI and capable of using your Netflix, Hulu, and other programs. TVs are set up and ready to go.

Guests will be held financially accountable for damages to the property.

listing_name: Club Wyndham Governor’s Green One-Bedroom Suite
description:
This conveniently located resort is the perfect place to access the best attractions and activities in Williamsburg. Unwind in your quaint one-bedroom resort suite that offers a private bedroom, fully equipped kitchen, living/dining area and a washer/dryer that will enhance your stay. Take the children to play at one of two playgrounds and enjoy three swimming pools, three hot tubs, a day spa, miniature golf, a billiards room, fitness center, massage, a tour desk and activities program.

The space
This spacious one-bedroom resort suite measures approximately 579 square feet. You will enjoy a king bed in the master bedroom and one queen sleeper sofa in the living room. Additional amenities include a kitchenette, dining area and washer/dryer. Maximum occupancy is four. Private sleeping area sleeps two.

Guest access
Resort Amenities:
• Near historic Williamsburg
• Pools & Hot Tubs
• Miniature Golf
• Tennis Courts
• Wi-Fi
• Resort Activities Program

FEE: There is an additional Fixed Tax of $2.00 per night, per reservation; this will be charged by the property and is due at check-in.

FEE: Wireless Internet is free for up to 4 devices, ideal for emails and basic web browsing. For more streaming and surfing options on unlimited devices, Enhanced High-Speed Wireless Internet is available for $9.95 per day, $49.95 for 6-10 days, and $59.95 for 11-30 days.

A vehicle is required to enjoy the area. Grocery store, shopping, dining, and entertainment: 5–10-minute drive.

The Giving Tree Spa at Wyndham Governor's Green offers a wide range of Body Treatments and Massage Therapy services.

Owners and guests have access to use the amenities at the resort they are registered at and will not be permitted to use the amenities at other CLUB WYNDHAM® properties in the Williamsburg area.

Other things to note
A valid government-issued identification and major credit card matching the name of the primary guest on the reservation is required at check-in.

You must be at least 21 years of age to check in and register for a room.

If reservation guest name needs to be changed, please contact via Airbnb message board, or call Extra Holidays at phone:800-917-1591.

A $250 security deposit (per stay) in addition to any remaining balance is due at the time of check-in. The security deposit will be released upon check-out and can take up to 7-14 business days to reflect in your account.

The resort accepts Visa, Mastercard, American Express, and Discover credit cards. Pre-paid cards, checks and credit card authorization forms are not accepted.

Unless specified in the listing description, room views and bedding configurations are not guaranteed and based on availability at check-In. Room décor and floor plans may vary slightly.

listing_name: 4BR condo sleeps 12 Near theme parks PHR comfy
description:
Just 15 minutes from Busch Gardens and the Water Park. 10 Minutes from Historic Williamsburg and Jamestown. Super close to William & Mary for Homecoming. This at the Historic Powhatan Resort with the perfect place to relax and unwind in a clean comfortable condo with amenities for everyone in your family.

This listing is for a 4BR lockoff pair of 2BR condos each sleeps 6 with full access to all resort amenities. You get 2 separate 2BR condos next to each other but pay only one resort fee.

The space
The 4BR Lockoff is actually a pair (x2) of 2BR Units with a shared common entry hallway or Upstairs/Downstairs combo of condos. Each 2BR Has a king bed in the Master BR and either a Queen bed OR 2 Full beds in the Guest room with a Queen sleeper sofa in the Living room. This is at the Historic Powhatan Resort by Diamond and includes access to all resort amenities.

1Q or 2F bed guest room assignments depend on which building you are assigned at checkin. THIS RESORT HAS LOTS OF STAIRS to reach two thirds of the available condos.

We have a two resorts in Williamsburg and each has different room types. See our other AIRBNB listings for details.

The resort will also collect separately (at checkout) a $21/nt resort fee per reservation which includes parking, wifi and access to amenities during your stay.

Guest access
No one owns any one particular villa at this resort. People own points in their Club and they assign an actual unit at check in when you arrive. We do not know which building you will be assigned or what floor you will be on until you get there. The front desk has complete control over unit assignment, cleaning and maintenance.

Bring your confirmation letter from the resort (on your phone is fine) to assist at check in and have a great time = : )

Other things to note
Check in begins at 4 pm but if you arrive in town prior to that by all means, visit the front desk and say hi. If your villa is ready they will be happy to check you in early and give you the keys. If not, you can explore the area while they finish cleaning and preparing for your arrival. = : )

24 Hour front desk. If there is any danger of arriving near midnight or later definitely call the front desk. Their computers cancel people as no show at midnight unless front desk staff throws a flag in their system the day of arrival. Front desk is option 5 on their phone system when you call.

Check out is always 10 am. The front desk will usually allow a late checkout until noon before they start adding new charges and an additional nite. It is entirely up to them and how badly they need to get into your unit to clean up before the next incoming guest. Ask about your options for late check out when you arrive. = ; )

This is a Diamond Resorts International property and the front desk will collect a FULLY REFUNDABLE $200 damage security deposit prior to check in. The deposit must be made on a major credit card. Cash and pre-paid- and/or debit cards are not accepted for the security depsit. This will merely be an \authorization\" which will expire unused within a few days. (None of my guests have ever caused damage inside any of the condos = : )

Resort fees

description:
Turn back the pages of time and become immersed in the Colonial spirit of Williamsburg, a historic city steeped in tradition and forever preserved as part of our nation’s history. Discover this 170-acre Early American town featuring 18th-century English architecture restored to its original condition, historic museums, monuments and fascinating battlefields which tell the dramatic story of our country’s birth.

The space
2 bedroom condo has a king bed, queen bed or two twin beds, queen sleeper sofa, living room, full kitchen, 2 full bathrooms, and washer/dryer! If you have a preference of bedding in the second bedroom, please request prior to booking (based on availability).

This is a timeshare resort but attending a presentation or taking a tour is NOT required.

All units are assigned by the resort. Unit view, floor, and location of unit on property cannot be guaranteed.

Guest checking in must be at least 21 years of age with a valid ID and credit card for security deposit.

Pricing and availability may vary.

Since the resort maintains all the units, unit decor may vary slightly from photos due to resort updates and/or changes.

Once reservations are confirmed, you will be asked for the name and address of the main guest who will check in (the resort's front desk will also ask for this information when you check in but obtaining this information before hand will expedite the check in process) along with an email address to receive a personal confirmation.

This is 2 bedrooms/2 bath fully stocked condo sleeps up to 6 guests . This is a timeshare resort however as our guest you are not required to take a tour. Kitchen and washer/dryer. There is a patio or balcony depending on unit assigned.

description:
Luxurious Third-Floor Condo in Kingsmill

Our fully furnished third-floor condo in the gated Kingsmill Resort community offers everything you need for a perfect Williamsburg getaway. Nestled along the scenic James River - just bring your luggage and groceries! While resort amenities aren't included, the savings you’ll enjoy booking with us will allow you to craft your own personalized Williamsburg experience.

Experience comfort, value, and the beauty of Kingsmill with us!

The space
Full sized kitchen, washer/dryer, and everything that you need to make yourself feel at home while you're with us.

Two master suites with King beds and a sleeper sofa in the living room.

Highspeed internet throughout. TV's in the common area and both bedrooms with Roku media options - sign in to your favorite streaming accounts and enjoy!

description:
The Colonies at Williamsburg: 4-Bedrooms, Sleeps 12, with two Full Kitchens, one without oven. Part of Vacation Village Resorts.

The Colonies at Williamsburg Resort accommodations feature two-and four-bedroom floor plans designed for maximum comfort. Kitchen, living room and dining room areas in each suite are integrated for entertaining and enjoyment. Designated suites meet Americans with Disabilities Act (ADA) requirements.

The space
Unit Features Four-bedroom floor plan:

Individual living and dining rooms
Ceramic tile and carpeted floors in living areas
Fully appointed kitchen equipped with granite countertop, stainless steel appliances such as range, dishwasher, full-size refrigerator with ice maker, microwave oven, coffee maker, toaster and blender
Necessary cookware and dinnerware service included in each suite
Conveniently located washer and dryer
Jetted tub and over-sized tiled shower in master bath
Makeup table with magnified mirror/ vanity area
Writing desk
In-room fireplace
Two king beds, two queen beds, and two queen sleeper sofas
Rollaway beds, cribs and highchairs available upon request*
All linens and bath towels provided
Televisions in living room and bedrooms
DVD Player
Cable television with HBO
In-room WiFi
In-room safe
Furnished balcony and/or patio
Hair dryer
Ironing board with iron

* Indicates that additional charges apply.

Guest access
Resort Amenities

1 heated indoor pool
1 outdoor pool featuring numerous water features
1 outdoor hot tub
Lounge chairs and pool towels
Barbecue grills and picnic tables
Children’s playground
Tennis
Arcade/game room
Family center with large screen TV, Wii gaming console and ping pong table
Fitness center
Computer center
Vending and ice machines

Resort Services

Free parking
Security on site
Concierge service
Complimentary DVD movie checkout
Complimentary coffee/tea in the Clubhouse
Daily scheduled activities**
Housekeeping services are not included. Mid-week cleaning is available upon request at a charge. (See Resort Policies for further information.)

** Indicates that additional charges may apply.

Other things to note
There is a $30.00 Resort Fee collected at the time of check-in (one fee per reservation). It includes Wi-Fi, access to the fitness center, business center & DVD library, coffee or tea in the clubhouse, and use of in-room safe.

If you plan to bring pets, $125.00 Pet Fee is extra, per pet per week; bringing a pet must be declared in advance for the pet friendly unit to be requested. Last minute reservations do not guarantee a pet friendly unit.

listing_name: Kingsmill Resort Business Class - Great Monthly
description:
Our suite offers the ideal balance of comfort and productivity. Work from the balcony with a stunning river view, the barista table, or a dedicated desk. Step outside for a break on scenic trails, or host meetings in a stylish space that feels more like home than a hotel.

Located in Williamsburg’s most exclusive resort community, this suite combines privacy with proximity to top attractions. Experience a thoughtfully designed space that supports both work and relaxation.

The space
Stay in a fully furnished third-floor suite within the gated luxury resort of Kingsmill, offering everything you need for a comfortable Williamsburg visit—just bring groceries and luggage!

This spacious efficiency features a king-sized bed, cozy lounge, and dining area, plus two mini-fridges, a microwave, and dishware. Step onto your private balcony to take in breathtaking views of the James River.

Enjoy high-speed internet throughout and a Smart TV with Roku, ready for you to sign into your favorite streaming accounts and unwind.

description:
Step back in time at The Historic Powhatan Resort, located on 256 acres of rolling woodland hills in historic Williamsburg, Virginia. The resort features a distinguished manor house that was originally built in 1735 and captures the true essence of its Colonial surroundings. Discover the nation’s history at one of Williamsburg’s history museums, monuments or battlefields, and immerse yourself in the city’s Colonial spirit.

The space
2 bedroom condo has a king bed, queen bed or two twin beds, queen sleeper sofa, living room, full kitchen, 2 full bathrooms, and washer/dryer! If you have a preference of bedding in the second bedroom, please request prior to booking (based on availability).


This is a timeshare resort but attending a presentation or taking a tour is NOT required.

All units are assigned by the resort. Unit view, floor, and location of unit on property cannot be guaranteed.

Guest checking in must be at least 21 years of age with a valid ID and credit card for security deposit.

Pricing and availability may vary.

Once reservations are confirmed, you will be asked for the name and address of the main guest who will check in (the resort's front desk will also ask for this information when you check in but obtaining this information before hand will expedite the check in process) along with an email address to receive a personal confirmation.

Since the resort maintains all the units, unit decor may vary slightly from photos due to resort updates and/or changes.

description:
Enjoy stunning balcony views of the James River from this elegant third-floor suite, surrounded by beautiful resort grounds and trails. Just minutes from Williamsburg’s top restaurants, it’s the perfect blend of relaxation and exploration.

The suite features a butler pantry, barista table for indoor/outdoor dining, and a romance package with special touches for couples. Fully furnished and just a few miles from Busch Gardens, this retreat offers tranquility with a hint of adventure.

listing_name: Lovely cozy room, walk to beach Kingsmill on James
description:
Lovely cozy room in beautiful Kingsmill on the James River (not part of Kingsmill Resort). Walk to private beach, spa, marina, waterfront. Room has own entrance, deck, hvac, microwave, mini-fridge (has an adjoining suite available, see larger listing). There's tennis, 7 miles of trails, bird sanctuary. Kingsmill is nextdoor to Busch Gardens and close to Yorktown & Jamestown!

*there's spa and beach access, for dogs too, but not pool... to use pool and resort, please book directly through Resort

The space
Cozy, lovely room and bath with beautiful sunsets in lovely tree and Audubon bird sanctuary, a lovely oasis adjacent to and built by Busch Gardens, the gated Kingsmill on the James River (not part of Kingsmill Resort, to use pool and resort please book directly through the resort**)
(Please note this is a legal Airbnb, not a timeshare.)
With 7 mi of walking and biking trails, private beaches within walking distance, and treasured historic ruins, there's so much to see and do. Not a resort condotel, this ground level unit backs to the beautiful tennis greenbelt with the River Course and lake across the street, and comes equipped with microwave, Keurig coffee maker, mini fridge (not a kitchen), coffees, teas, oatmeal... all the single rooms here in Kingsmill have an adjoining suite available, with two locking doors in between (see larger listing)... if there are guests in adjoining suite, you may hear them, but there is no unit above you or in back of you. You can walk to the beautiful beach, the spa overlooking the water for pampering, the dock to see Busch Gardens Summer fireworks, and playground! Eat on your own deck with beautiful sunsets overlooking the lovely tennis greenbelt surrounded by Evergreens and woods where we've spotted deer, bunnies, gophers, squirrels, wild turkeys, groundhogs, ospreys, or walk to the outdoor dining Terrace!...there is basketball, tennis courts, pickleball, grills, picnic areas, soccer fields, and restroom and shower down by the marina..there's many books, firestick, YouTubeTV, Sling, Starz, Hulu, Netflix, HBOMax... Fish at stocked lake at Macaulay's park, barbecue at Mount Bay, golf at the legendary Green or Gold course at Golden Horseshoe, take the ferry to historic Surry and eat at the famous Surry Seafood Waterfront Restaurant, admire the beautiful estates along the James, visit the historic Beach Village at Yorktown where Washington won our independence, or spend a day following the Williamsburg Tasting Trail

**Please note, suite is in Kingsmill on the James River, not Kingsmill Resort...there's beach access, for dogs too, but not pool....to use pool and resort facilities, please book directly through the resort. The spa is available with your stay

Other things to note
unit is on street that backs to the beautiful tennis greenbelt surrounded by Evergreens and woods, with the lake and River Golf Course across the street

All units here are pet friendly. Dogs are welcome but sorry no cats

**please note this is in Kingsmill on the James River, not Kingsmill Resort... there's beach access, for dogs too, but not pool... to use pool, golf and most resort amenities* please book directly through resort.

*The spa is available with your stay!

Guests can golf at the beautiful Green or Gold course at Golden Horseshoe

description:
Welcome to your perfect Williamsburg getaway! This charming 3-bedroom, 2-bath home offers a cozy, fully equipped retreat near all the top spots.

Relax with a TV in each bedroom, cook up meals on the gas range, or unwind on the spacious back deck. Perfect for exploring or recharging, this home has everything you need for a memorable stay.

The space
Nestled in a peaceful neighborhood yet close to everything Williamsburg offers! Busch Gardens, Water Country USA, and Colonial Williamsburg are all within 4 miles, with Jamestown just 10 miles away.

Surrounded by the area's top attractions and historic landmarks, there's plenty to explore, ensuring that your getaway is one to remember. Its just 5 minutes from historic Williamsburg, Club Wyndham Kingsgate provides convenient access to historic attractions, wineries, beaches, and local artisan shops. description:
Everything needed for a memorable getaway to historic Williamsburg is right here. Take advantage of on-site recreation and endless amenities in a picturesque setting. The well-manicured lawns and pristine lakes make a lovely retreat after a day of adventuring in Colonial Williamsburg.

The space
Just three miles north of historic Williamsburg, Club Wyndham Governor's Green offers easy access to some of Williamsburg's most popular destinations. From historic landmarks and walking trails to wineries, beaches, and artisan shops, experience the charm of one of Virginia's oldest cities. The resort also offers a variety of amenities and events, including painting classes, wine and cheese tastings, muffins and mimosas, ice cream socials, and fun activities and crafts for kids, like sharpie tie-dye, candy bingo, and build-a-buddy workshops.

•Owners and guests have access to use the amenities at the resort they are registered at, and will not be permitted to use the amenities at other CLUB WYNDHAM properties in the Williamsburg area
•Wireless Internet is free for up to 4 devices, ideal for emails and basic web browsing. For more streaming and surfing options on unlimited devices, Enhanced High-Speed Wireless Internet is available for $9.95 per day, $49.95 for 6-10 days, and $59.95 for 11-30 days.
The resort is currently experiencing a balcony restoration project. During this time, balconies in select suites and some areas will not be available and will be blocked off. Additionally, guests may encounter noise, dust, and odors, and work crew onsite. All project updates will be announced as they become available.
• We require the guest information for the primary guest (should at least be 21 years old) checking in to be provided as soon as possible to avoid check-in issues.

• Photos are not of the specific suite you are renting, and your suite may vary slightly from the photos.

• Guests are required to accept additional terms and conditions in accordance with the resort's policies, including any applicable taxes and fees paid to the resort.
• No refunds or credits will be granted outside of the listing's cancellation policy.

listing_name: Bamboo Bungalo Duplex Near Busch Gardens
description:
Find your home away from home when visiting historic Williamsburg. It feels very private here nestled amongst the bamboo and trees. This is a great location for families with children! We are within 5 minutes of Bush Gardens and Water Country for great family fun outings! For history buffs, we are 7 minutes from Colonial Williamsburg, 15 minutes from Jamestown Settlement and 20 minutes from Yorktown Battlefields. Enhance your stay with a relaxing herbal massage at the on site massage studio!

The space
Enjoy the fully stocked kitchen featuring a coffee maker, pots, pans, and all the dishware you may need!

3 bedrooms, 2 with queen beds, the 3rd with a queen size bed and a tented twin. The kids LOVE the tent bed!

Feel free to do laundry while you're with us too with the full size washer and dryer.

Have family style meals in the dining room with space for up to 7 people to sit. A high chair is also provided for babies and toddlers.

Extra bedding and pillows are available as well.
